notes: Flush mounted installation with manually covered rolling jack
This configuration is most often used for rust maintenance of lift platforms
The front of the lift unit is placed to the front of the lift unit
The rear of the lift unit is placed to the rear of the lift platforms
Inches at the rear of the lift for this motion
